name: part_007
file: tmp_【 #百鬼あやめ7周年新衣装3D 】百鬼あやめ７周年記念ライブ  ～天女繚華～ 【百鬼あやめ⧸ホロライブ】 [uRa-uLMea7w]_gemini-3-flash-preview/reencoded/part_007.mov

scenes.description: Nakiri Ayame performs her original song 'Yoi no Yoi yoi' on a traditional Japanese-style stage.
A cinematic transition scene featuring fireworks and graphics celebrating Nakiri Ayame's 7th anniversary with guests Ookami Mio, Sakura Miko, and Shirakami Fubuki.
Nakiri Ayame, Ookami Mio, Sakura Miko, and Shirakami Fubuki perform 'Nippon Egao Hyakkei'.

subtitles.original: めぐるめくる タイムバイヨイヨイ
subtitles.english: Going round and round, time by yoi-yoi

subtitles.original: 君を連れて
subtitles.english: Taking you with me

subtitles.original: あまうてなどか 心悲しき
subtitles.english: Why do the raindrops feel so sad in my heart?

subtitles.original: 身勝手なのが 世の理か
subtitles.english: Is being selfish just the way of the world?

subtitles.original: 移ろはばこそ こころなどどを
subtitles.english: Because things change, there's nothing to fear

subtitles.original: 恐るることなど あらざらむ
subtitles.english: about things like the heart

subtitles.original: ニッポン笑顔百景
subtitles.english: Japan: A Hundred Views of Smiles

subtitles.original: 作詞・作曲・編曲：前山田健一
subtitles.english: Lyrics/Composition/Arrangement: Kenichi Maeyamada

subtitles.original: よ〜っ！
subtitles.english: Yo~!

subtitles.original: じゅげむ じゅげむ 五劫のすりきれ
subtitles.english: Jugemu, Jugemu, the wear and tear of five eons

subtitles.original: かいじゃりすいぎょの すいぎょうまつ
subtitles.english: Gravel and sea-fish, the end of Suigyo

subtitles.original: うんらいまつ ふうらいまつ くうねるところに すむところ
subtitles.english: Unraimatsu, Furaimatsu, where one eats, sleeps, and lives

subtitles.original: やぶらこうじのぶらこうじ
subtitles.english: Yaburakoji, Burakoji

subtitles.original: ぱいぽぱいぽ ぱいぽのしゅーりんがん
subtitles.english: Paipo, Paipo, the Shuringan of Paipo

subtitles.original: しゅーりんがんの ぐーりんだい
subtitles.english: The Gurindai of Shuringan

subtitles.original: しゅーりんがんの ぐーりんだい ぐーりんだいの
subtitles.english: The Gurindai of Shuringan, the Gurindai's

subtitles.original: ぽんぽこぴーの ぽんぽこなーの ちょうきゅうめいの
subtitles.english: Ponpokopi, Ponpokona, the long-lived

subtitles.original: ちょうすけ！
subtitles.english: Chosuke!

subtitles.original: ちょいとお時間いただきます
subtitles.english: Please give us a moment of your time

subtitles.original: ご清聴ください
subtitles.english: Please listen carefully

subtitles.original: 整いました！
subtitles.english: I've got it!

subtitles.original: 「笑うこと」とかけまして
subtitles.english: Comparing 'laughter' to...

subtitles.original: 「お祭り野郎」と解きます
subtitles.english: a 'festival-loving guy'...

subtitles.original: そのこころは？ そのこころは？
subtitles.english: And the reason is? The reason is?

subtitles.original: どちらもハッピ（法被）になるでしょう
subtitles.english: Both will become 'happy' (wearing a happi coat)

subtitles.original: おあとがよろしいようで
subtitles.english: That's it for this bit

subtitles.original: わらおう わらおう さあわらいましょ
subtitles.english: Let's laugh, let's laugh, come on, let's laugh

subtitles.original: こんな時代こそ わらいましょ
subtitles.english: Especially in times like these, let's laugh

subtitles.original: わらおう ないたら負けだ
subtitles.english: Let's laugh, if you cry you lose

subtitles.original: やけくそわらいましょ
subtitles.english: Let's laugh desperately

subtitles.original: 波乱万丈 すいもあまいも
subtitles.english: Full of ups and downs, both bitter and sweet

subtitles.original: 乗り越えたあっぱれ 日本人
subtitles.english: Bravo to the Japanese who overcame it all

subtitles.original: わらおう どんな時でも
subtitles.english: Let's laugh, no matter when

subtitles.original: なにくそわらいましょ
subtitles.english: Let's laugh through everything

subtitles.original: わっはっは にょっほっほ
subtitles.english: Wah-ha-ha, Nyoh-ho-ho

subtitles.original: 空気なんて読まずに笑っとけ
subtitles.english: Don't worry about the mood, just laugh

subtitles.original: 笑顔！ 笑顔！
subtitles.english: Smiles! Smiles!

subtitles.original: 笑う門には福来たる！
subtitles.english: Fortune comes to those who smile!

subtitles.original: え〜、皆様、今日はようこそおいでいただきました
subtitles.english: Well, everyone, thank you for coming today

subtitles.original: ここで一席！！
subtitles.english: And now, a short story!

subtitles.original: ねずみの娘がお嫁に行って、
subtitles.english: A mouse's daughter got married,

subtitles.original: じきに帰ってきたんでねずみのおかあさんが大変怒って、
subtitles.english: but returned home soon after, making her mother very angry,

subtitles.original: 「あんな、いいところへ、おまえ嫁いで、
subtitles.english: “You were married into such a fine place,

subtitles.original: 誰が嫌で出てきたんだい？」
subtitles.english: who did you dislike so much that you left?”

subtitles.original: 「いいえ、だーれも嫌じゃないんですけれど、
subtitles.english: “No, I didn't dislike anyone,

subtitles.original: ご隠居さんがやさしいんで、嫌なの。」
subtitles.english: but the retired master was too kind, so I hated it.”

subtitles.original: 「優しいんなら結構じゃないかぁねぇ。」
subtitles.english: “If he was kind, isn't that wonderful?”

subtitles.original: 「でも、猫なで声ですもの。」
subtitles.english: “But, he spoke with a cat-caressing voice.”

subtitles.original: 忙しさに身を任せて
subtitles.english: Surrendering myself to the busyness

subtitles.original: 消えていくだなんて
subtitles.english: To think it would just fade away

subtitles.original: べらんめえ！
subtitles.english: Don't be ridiculous!

subtitles.original: わらおう わらおう 笑えなくても
subtitles.english: Let's laugh, let's laugh, even if you can't laugh

subtitles.original: 笑うしかないでしょ 笑いましょ
subtitles.english: All we can do is laugh, so let's laugh

subtitles.original: 口角上げて ひたすら笑いましょ
subtitles.english: Lift the corners of your mouth and just laugh

subtitles.original: 鬼の乱、大飢饉さえ
subtitles.english: Even Oni rebellions and great famines

subtitles.original: クリアして現代 日本人
subtitles.english: The modern Japanese have cleared them all

subtitles.original: わらおう 未来永劫
subtitles.english: Let's laugh for all eternity

subtitles.original: ぐははと笑いましょ
subtitles.english: Let's laugh with a big 'Guhaha'

subtitles.original: 小娘の戯言と切り捨てないで
subtitles.english: Don't dismiss it as just a little girl's nonsense

subtitles.original: しかめっつらなんか変な顔 笑顔を見たいから
subtitles.english: A scowl is a strange face, I want to see your smile

subtitles.original: わらおう わらおう さあわらいましょ
subtitles.english: Let's laugh, let's laugh, come on, let's laugh

subtitles.original: こんな時代こそ わらいましょ
subtitles.english: Especially in times like these, let's laugh

subtitles.original: わらおう ないたら負けだ
subtitles.english: Let's laugh, if you cry you lose

subtitles.original: やけくそわらいましょ
subtitles.english: Let's laugh desperately

subtitles.original: 波乱万丈 すいもあまいも
subtitles.english: Full of ups and downs, both bitter and sweet

subtitles.original: 乗り越えたあっぱれ 日本人
subtitles.english: Bravo to the Japanese who overcame it all

subtitles.original: わらおう どんな時でも
subtitles.english: Let's laugh, no matter when

subtitles.original: なにくそわらいましょ
subtitles.english: Let's laugh through everything

subtitles.original: ひたすら笑いましょ
subtitles.english: Let's just keep on laughing

subtitles.original: わっはっは にょっほっほ
subtitles.english: Wah-ha-ha, Nyoh-ho-ho

subtitles.original: 空気なんて読まずに笑っとけ
subtitles.english: Don't worry about the mood, just laugh

subtitles.original: 笑顔！ 笑顔！
subtitles.english: Smiles! Smiles!

subtitles.original: 笑う門には福来たる！
subtitles.english: Fortune comes to those who smile!
